pos_sentences: We conduct foundation day, and celebrate festivals like onam, christmas and we have a students union leading sports and arts club in the college.
Experienced teachers . thiruvananthapuram dental college has several experienced and talented teachers willing to help the students learn more about dentistry.
The college is very reputed and we get a great exposure to patients

Hostels are well maintained with clean rooms and surroundings.basic facilities are present with good food and water.the hostel has a hygenic mess along with good cafe.the registration is taken from the hostel itself and include rs 500 as registration fee.
Bds is not an underrated course much hand skill is needed for the bds here practical work is more important when compared with mbbs
neg_sentences: Lack of hostel facilities.currently we are allotted in bpharm hostel.we dont have a specific hostel for dental students.
They do not provide hostel for ladies. so it is difficult to stay in private
The mess cut will provide only if we cut the mess for more than five days.
